On No-to-Counterfeit Day, we pause to raise awareness on the risks of counterfeit parts and the importance of protecting every journey with the right parts.

For 60 years, Toyota Tanzania has cared for the journeys that matter most.

Say no to counterfeit. Choose Toyota Genuine Parts.

Most people think a hybrid needs to be plugged in. This one doesn‚Äôt.‚Äã

‚ÄãThe Toyota Corolla Cross Hybrid automatically recharges its battery while you drive. Energy is recovered during braking, while the hybrid system also generates electricity during normal driving.‚Äã

‚ÄãNo charging station. No cables. No inconvenience.‚Äã

‚ÄãJust get in, drive, and enjoy the benefits of Toyota hybrid technology.‚Äã

‚Äã
Learn more at: https://toyota.co.tz/corolla-cross‚Äã

‚Äã

#Toyota #Hybrid #CorollaCross #BeyondZero #ToyotaTanzania

Every new Toyota sold through Toyota Tanzania comes with a 5-year/150,000km warranty as standard.‚Äã

‚Äã
That means for up to five years or 150,000 kilometres, your vehicle is backed by Toyota-trained technicians using only genuine Toyota parts. Any manufacturing defect or mechanical failure under normal use is covered. No surprises. No unexpected repair bills.‚Äã

‚ÄãWhen you buy a Toyota through Toyota Tanzania, you are not just buying a vehicle. You are buying five years of confidence on every road.‚Äã

‚Äã
Learn more at www.toyota.co.tz ‚Äã

‚Äã

Mastery endures. Its spirit, ever evolving. Not merely preserved in time, ‚Äã‚Äã

but renewed and refined with every generation. ‚Äã‚Äã

This is Toyota‚Äôs Shikinen Seng≈´.‚Äã‚Äã

The GR GT, GR GT3, and Lexus LFA Concept are its modern expression. ‚Äã‚Äã

Three machines developed as one, guided by an obsession with three core principles ‚Äì low center of gravity, lightweight construction with high rigidity, and aerodynamic precision.‚Äã‚Äã

Together, they form a thrilling new dynasty of GAZOO Racing and ‚Äã‚Äã

LEXUS performance. ‚Äã‚Äã

This is Toyota‚Äôs mastery, taking new shape.‚Äã

#TheSoulLivesOn ‚Äã#GR #Lexus ‚Äã#GRGT #GRGT3 #LexusLFA

‚ÄúGrateful for the opportunity from @kilimanjaromarathon and @toyota.tanzania to serve as a Sub-3 pacer this year,Finishing in 2:55 while helping others chase their goals was truly an unforgettable experience.

Thank you to everyone who trusted the pace, fought through the hard moments, and never gave up. Marathon running continues to prove that limits are meant to be challenged.

To every runner: keep training, stay disciplined, and believe in yourself ‚Äî great things take time.

Wishing everyone all the best for the 2027 Kili Marathon if God wishes. See you again on the starting line stronger, wiser, and ready for more miles. ü¶çüö∂‚Äç‚ôÇÔ∏è

Benki ya Exim Tanzania imeingia katika ushirikiano wa kimkakati na Toyota wenye lengo la kufanya umiliki wa magari kuwa rahisi zaidi na nafuu kwa Watanzania. 

Kupitia ushirikiano huu, suluhisho maalum la ufadhili wa magari limeanzishwa, likiwawezesha watu binafsi na biashara kununua magari mapya na yaliyotumika kwa gharama ndogo ya awali Pamoja na muda nafuu wa marejesho unaoweza kufikia hadi miaka sita. 

Akizungumza wakati wa hafla ya utiaji Saini huo, Mkuu wa Huduma za Benki kwa Wateja Binafsi na wa Kati wa Benki ya Exim Tanzania, Andrew Lyimo, alisema ushirikiano huo unaonesha dhamira ya Benki kuendelea kutoa suluhisho bunifu na zinazomlenga mteja moja kwa moja.

@toyota.tanzania 
@exim_banktz 
#mwananchiupdates 
#tunawezeshataifa

Even the most demanding drivers find peace of mind at Toyota Tanzania. ü§ù 
While Mr. To relaxes, our experts ensure his vehicle stays in perfect condition thanks to a comprehensive maintenance plan ‚Äî at NO additional cost. 

What‚Äôs included in your Toyota Value plus visit? 
‚úÖ Multipoint check:  Tire pressure, fluid levels, braking systems. 
‚úÖ General inspection: Suspension, chassis and essential components. 
‚úÖ Toyota expertise: 100% genuine parts installed by certified technicians. 
üìà Preserve your car's resale value and drive with total confidence. 

Demand the best for your Toyota. Visit your closest Toyota Tanzania branch and learn more.

We‚Äôre excited to partner with Toyota Tanzania to bring you closer to owning the car you‚Äôve always wanted. 

With flexible and easy financing options designed around your needs, getting your car is now simpler, faster, and more within reach. Whether it‚Äôs for your daily life, your business, or a personal goal, we‚Äôre here to support your journey every step of the way. 

Speaking during the signing ceremony, our Head of Retail, Andrew Lyimo, shared:
 

‚ÄúAt Exim Bank, we are focused on going beyond traditional Banking by providing solutions that respond directly to the everyday needs of our customers. This partnership with Toyota allows us to simplify vehicle ownership by offering flexible financing options that ease the financial burden while supporting both personal mobility and business growth,‚Äù said Lyimo.
 

Because it‚Äôs not just about owning a car, it‚Äôs about moving forward, growing, and enjoying the freedom to go further.

#Eximbank 
#toyotatanzania 
#Partnership

Driven to support every mile 

On April 18th, 2026, Toyota Tanzania proudly powered the Bunge Marathon as the Lead Vehicle Sponsor at Jamhuri Stadium, Dodoma. From leading race categories to high-visibility activations, our presence ensured smooth operations and strong engagement throughout the event.

We remain committed to supporting community-driven initiatives that bring people together across Tanzania.

#ToyotaTanzania #BungeMarathon2026 #DrivingProgress #CommunitySupport #MobilityForAll

‚Äã

Today, we honour the legacy of Abeid Amani Karume, whose leadership helped shape the foundation of our nation.

As we reflect on his impact, we are reminded of the importance of unity, resilience, and moving forward together.

#KarumeDay #ToyotaTanzania #ForwardTogether #Tanzania
